caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, large over-ear headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold lettering sits at a dark table. He is adorned with a gold chain and a gold watch on his left wrist. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a repeated gold star logo and the words "UNIQUE HUSTLE." To his right, a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A dark mug sits on the table with text that includes "TALK OUT". In the bottom left corner, a small circular logo is visible. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression while looking off-camera to his right, suggesting he is engaged in a conversation.
